titleStmt.title: SII 27.194: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 194. (A.R. No. 542 of 1929-30.) BAINDŪRU, COONDAPOOR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up by the side of the tank called ‘Hosakere’ near the Śayanēśvara temple.

This record registers a gift of some plots of land, after purchase from several individuals, to a maṭha and for the worship of and offerings to the goddess Paramēśvari by Kēśavaṇa-seṭṭi, son of Saṅkaraseṭṭi and grandson of Muddaṇa-seṭṭi, when mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Channa-Bairādēvi-amma, daughter of Bairādēvi-amma, was governing Bayidūru and other areas from her capital at Saṅgītapura.
It is dated Śaka 1482, Siddhārthi, Vaiśākha śu. 15, the details being insufficient for verification. The tithi corresponds to 1559 A.D., April 21.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrī sarasvatayē namaḥ . śrī gurubhyōnamaḥ .
namastuṁga śirastuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāśiva
rāyamahārāyara rājyābhyudayadalli śrīmaṁnmahāmaṁḍalēśvara
ru bayirādēvi Ammanavara varakumāri caṁna bayirādēvi Aṁmanavaru saṁgītapuravara rājadāniyalirddu
līlāvinōdadiṁ saddharmmakathā brasaṁgadiṁ bayidūru muṁtāda samastarājyava
nu pratipālisuttiddaṁdina śālivāhana śakavaruṣa 1482 neya siddhā
rthi saṁvatsarada vayiśākha śu 15 lū saṁkara seṭṭiyaramaga mudaṇa seṭiyara moṁmaga cora
jarabaḷiya kēsavaṇa seṭiyaru barasida dharmaśāsanada bhāṣākramaveṁteṁdare nāu
kaṭṭisida maṭhake dārmakebiṭa samarppaṇe hāleyara bayaloḷage bharmaseṭiya kayali
yoru seṭṭiya moṁmagaḷu nāgubāle seṭṭitiya kayalu siriyaṁṇāḷuvana moṁmaga
beṁmmaseṭṭiyavara kaiyalū mūlava koṁḍa bāḷu hiriyagaddege gaḍi māḍalu dēvi
ya bāgila gaddeya Aṁccugaḍi teṁkalu hariva voḍugaḍi padādalu taṁmaṇaseṭṭi
biṭi dharmada bāḷugaḍi Ādu baṁdahāge nāraṇaseṭiya bāḷugaḍi baḍagalu hariva kā
rugaḍi yiṁtī nālukugaḍiyiṁdoḷagaṇa gade muḍi 3 hāne 30 ke kaṭida gēṇi kaṁcina hāne 40 leka mu
10 Akkimuḍi 10 beṁmaseṭṭiya moṁmagaḷu beṁmakaseṭitiya kayyali mūlavakoṁḍa karikina
gadeya gaḍiya vivara mūḍalu kariya dēvakaseṭitiya bāḷu gaḍi teṁkalu kaṭu bayalagade gaḍi
paḍuvalu harivahaḷagaḍi baḍagalu saṁkara seṭiya gaḍiya Aṁcu gaḍi yiṁtī
nālku gaḍiyiṁda voḷagaṇa ga hā 40 gade kaṭṭidage kaṁcina hā 40 lkedalu Akkimu 2 mattaṁ Aṣṭa
guṇada bāḷa gaḍivivara mūḍalu beṁmaseṭṭiya maṭhada bāḷugaḍi teṁkalu bāleya beṁma
seṭṭiya bāḷugaḍi paḍuvalu hariva hāḷagaḍi baḍagalu kartara bāḷugaḍi yiṁtī nālāku gaḍi
ya voḷage gadehāne 50 mataṁ gaḍi mūḍalu kaluseṭiya hitilu gaḍi teṁkalu kalu
seṭiya kurabavara baḷugaḍi paḍuvalu maṭada baḷugaḍi baḍagalu yiru seṭiya bā
ḷu gaḍi yikena lekanagaḍi hāne 30 yiṟavatu hāneya beyaṁ muḍi 2 Adake kaṭu
Aki muḍi 5 mataṁ hoḷeya kereyi bayaloḷage sōmeka baḷiya kayalu mū
lava koṁḍagade hāne 40 gaḍi mūḍalu yiruseṭiya baḷugade gaḍi teṁkalu maṭhada baḷu gaḍi pa
ḍuvalu haḷagaḍi baḍagalu maṭhada baḷugaḍi yidake kaṭhi dagēṇi Akkimuḍi 2 mataṁ tiruma
ra saṁkamanara kayalu mūlavakoṁḍa hoḷeya kereya bayiloḷage gadehāne 30 ma
taṁ koḍage hāne 22 nīratu baḷi koḍage hāne 20 karivagēṇi Akkimuḍi 4 nagamaseṭhitiya kayya
lu mūlava koṁḍabāḷu kudala bayiloḷage bakanagade ganamulu yiru seṭiya maṭha baḷu
gaḍi teṁkalu sakukogana baḷugaḍi paḍuvalu keregaḍi baḍagalu suliyaseṭiya bāḷu
gaḍi nalkugaḍiya vaḷagaḍehāne 30 mata nīratu baḷigade hāne 30 mata maku koganama
ṭa gadeyiṁda baḍagaṇagade hāne yi 20 Ubheyaṁ muḍe 2 kaṭhida gēṇi Akki muḍi 6 ma
taṁ karkatana mūlava baḷu Agaḍi bagila varege gaḍi muḍalu vōṇigaḍi teṁkalu hi
tilugaḍi paḍuvalu battiya bāḷugaḍi baḍagalu Aṁcu gaḍi vaḷagaṇa gade
muḍi 2 kaṭhidagēṇi Akimuḍi 5 mataṁ kāpuseṭiya bayala voḷage nama
mulava baḷigaḍi muḍalu baṁkēśvaradēva baḷugaḍi teṁkalu baṁkēśvaradēvara bāḷu
gaḍi paḍuvalu daregaḍi baḍagalu malaya seṭhiya bāḷugaḍi yiṁtī catu
sīmeya vaḷagaṇa gademuḍi 4 yi gadege kaṭhidagēṇi Akkimuḍi 12 mataṁ ka

damaged
gaḍi paḍuvalu kartara baḷugaḍi ko ge naguseṭhiya bā
ḷu gaḍi baḍagalu saṁkara bhaṭhara baḷugaḍi yi gaḍidavaḷagaḍe kereya ma kā
ra daseya vaThe muḍi 2 Adake kaṭhida gēṇi Akimuḍi [ mataṁ] pa
mulada baḷige gaḍimuḍalu tōḍu gaḍiteṁkalu beṁmmaṇa
seṭiya baḷugaḍi paḍuvalu bemaṇaseṭiya baḷugaḍi baḍagalu ma
bu seṭhiyavara maṭha baḷugaḍi davaḷa sēnavage baḍada bagadali vakika
ṭhida gēṇi Akimuḍi hattu 10 togarana gadeya paḍuva datōṭake kaṭi
dagēṇi 11 mataṁ Atara bayaloḷage nāgarasiya kayyakoṁḍa mūlava
yippatu hāne gadege kaṭidagēṇi Aki muḍi 2 Aṁṇumūliyaru haya
ṭeya beṁmaseṭiya kayyalu Avara baṁnada kāhu hatu hoṁnu Adaroḷage naṁ
ma pālige baṁda hoṁnu yeraḍu taṁmaṇaseṭiya vīruseṭiya hale ba
geyiṁda yeraḍu hoṁnu beḷetiya heṭina bageyiṁda yeraḍu hoṁnu A
ṁtu honnu Artha yī hoṁnanu sthaḷada sēnabōvana kayyali yiḷuhikoṁḍu E
ṁṭu haṇa beḷeyanu sēnabōvanu baṁdu Aramanege tetu baheU Aṁtu Aki
muḍi kaṁcina hane 40 lekkadalū Uṁṇadava ga 1 yidaroḷage bayaradēvi
maneya beḍige yirumuḍi Akinu tarisi cautiyahōmake
ciramuḍige paramēśvariya dīpake gaṁdhake ke murumuḍi Akiya
nu Utarisi migilāda kaṁcina hāne 40 lū muḍi 60 Akṣaradalū Aru
vatu muḍi Aki yi Akige naḍava dharṁma ke vivara naṁmataṁde saṁka
raseṭiya matāyi toḷaceka seṭitiya
Acaṁdrārkasthāyi
yāgi naṁma varu pratipālisi naḍasuvaru naḍasade Aprabhuva
kālake naṁma coravara baḷiya samasta
naṁma bhōgavanu naḍava dharṁmavanū vicāramā
ḍi paripālisi naḍasuvaru naḍasade māḍida vā vāraṇāsiyali
maṁdi brāṁhmara koṁda pāpake hōharu
damaged
Digital edition of SII 27.194 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
